description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have concurrent jobs that cancel in-progress runs. It should have two jobs: one for linting and one for testing with multiple Python versions. The lint job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.12, installs dependencies, and runs pre-commit. The test job depends on lint, checks out the code, sets up different Python versions, installs dependencies, and runs tests.
